$comment: BD-FIXTURES — GROUND TRUTH for the ARCHETYPE CATEGORIZER (release-spec §1.2 Content Categorization: 'bucket content into specific Content Archetypes ... capture idea seeds and strong argument patterns, hooks'). The categorizer turns the deterministic analysis (expected/analysis.json) into a per-brand archetype catalog the matcher later selects from — one entry per archetype the brand should run, each carrying DERIVED seeds/hooks. CRITICAL (RD-9 risk): every seed/hook is a PATTERN abstracted from the corpus, NEVER a verbatim line — see `pattern_source` + the no-verbatim guarantee. Competitor-derived entries record `derived_from: competitor` and carry NO competitor copy. A sibling engine batch writes brands/<id>/archetypes/*.md from this catalog (templates/brand/archetypes.template.md shape). ALL SYNTHETIC — Acme Cosmos only. See PROVENANCE.md.
no_verbatim_guarantee: Every hook/seed string below is a derived PATTERN, not a copied corpus line. The no-verbatim-check.json test asserts no hook/seed is a verbatim substring of any Zone-U competitor corpus item.

archetypes.pattern_source: own-corpus how-to items (blurry-Moon fix, three-minute Moon, eyepiece order)
hook_patterns: Name the task and the payoff, then give the steps in order.
Lead with the single most common mistake, then the two-step fix.
archetypes.voice_note: low drama; every step must work with the product as shipped

archetypes.pattern_source: own-corpus 'point at this now' items (Jupiter low east, Pleiades)
hook_patterns: Ask the timing question, then name the object and where to point.
Give the one thing visible tonight and the finder step to reach it.

archetypes.pattern_source: own-corpus honest-miss items (clouds at 9:58, faint counts)
hook_patterns: Open on the setback, close on what you caught anyway.
Tell the night plainly, including what went wrong.
archetypes.voice_note: calm about failure; atmosphere allowed, no fabricated causation

archetypes.pattern_source: own-corpus build-rationale items (why a 25mm default, why no motor)
hook_patterns: State the design choice, then the beginner-first reason behind it.
Answer a 'why did you build it this way' with the trade-off.
archetypes.voice_note: we-voice; product claims must be true as shipped

archetypes.pattern_source: competitor numbered-how-to pattern (high bookmark-lift) — PATTERN borrowed, wording NOT
hook_patterns: Number the steps explicitly and end on the payoff.
Promise a count of steps in the opener, then deliver them.
must_include: a named payoff at the end
archetypes.voice_note: adopt the structure only; rewrite entirely in Acme voice — never reuse competitor wording

anti_patterns.label: scarcity-teaser-giveaway
anti_patterns.reason: reply-spiky but bookmark-poor; conflicts with drama_dial low and the hard-no on manufactured urgency
